name: WPI Inflation
description: The Wholesale Price Index tracks prices at the producer/wholesale level rather than what consumers pay. It's more volatile than CPI and often moves first when input costs shift, making it an early-warning read on pipeline inflation.
releaseSchedule: Released monthly, typically around the 14th, for the previous month.

chart.title: Wholesale prices are turning up again
chart.subtitle: WPI inflation, year-on-year % change, monthly
chart.source: Ministry of Commerce and Industry; illustrative series
